---
name: Framework Extension
about: Propose a new section, concept, mapping, or structural change to the ESF
title: "[Extension] "
labels: enhancement, framework
---

**What are you proposing?**
Describe the addition or change. Is it a new section, a new bridging concept, a new mapping, or a modification to an existing phase?

**Which part of the framework does this affect?**
- [ ] Specification (phase definitions, principles, concepts)
- [ ] Rubric (scoring criteria, maturity profiles)
- [ ] Mappings (OWASP, MITRE, other frameworks)
- [ ] Guides (decision trees, quick-start)
- [ ] Other

**What problem does this solve?**
What gap in the current framework does this address? Include real-world context if possible.

**Proposed content (optional)**
If you have draft content, include it here or reference a branch.

**Breaking change?**
Would this change require re-assessment of systems already scored against the ESF?
- [ ] Yes — this is a MAJOR version change
- [ ] No — this is backward-compatible
